I believe these are all of the strict MV3 scales with eleven notes. Unconditional MV3 scales may have any L:M:s ratio. Conditional MV3 scales have a condition specified in the section header that the L:M:s ratio needs to satisfy in order for the scale to be strict MV3. Lines with two scales separated with a slash are lexicographically left and right chiral scales respectively, lines with only one scale are therefore achiral. All scales are written in their brightest mode. Scales are grouped into sisterhoods. Unconditional sisterhoods may have up to six scales while conditional sisterhoods appear to have up to two scales. The two scales in conditional sisterhoods have their L's and s's swapped.


'''Here's some stats:'''

416 Scales Total

30 Unconditional Single-Period

386 Conditional Single-Period

0 Unconditional Multi-Period

0 Conditional Multi-Period


== Unconditional ==

=== <u>Single-Period</u> ===

'''9L 1M 1s:'''
LLLLLsLLLLM / LLLLLMLLLLs

'''1L 9M 1s:'''
LMMMMsMMMMM / LMMMMMsMMMM

'''1L 1M 9s:'''
LsssssMssss / LssssMsssss


'''7L 2M 2s:'''
LLMLLsLMLLs / LLMLLsLLMLs

'''2L 7M 2s:'''
LMMsMMLMsMM / LMMsMLMMsMM

'''2L 2M 7s:'''
LssMsLssMss / LsMssLssMss


'''5L 5M 1s:'''
LMLMLMLMLsM / LMLMLMLMLMs

'''5L 1M 5s:'''
LsLsLsLsLsM / LMsLsLsLsLs

'''1L 5M 5s:'''
LsMsMsMsMsM / LMsMsMsMsMs


'''5L 3M 3s:'''
LMLsLMLsMLs / LMLsLMLsLMs

'''3L 5M 3s:'''
LMsMLMsMLsM / LMsLMsMLMsM

'''3L 3M 5s:'''
LsMLsMsLsMs / LMsLsMsLsMs


'''4L 4M 3s:'''
LMLsMLsMLMs / LMLsMLMsLMs

'''4L 3M 4s:'''
LMsLsMLsMLs / LMsLMsLsMLs

'''3L 4M 4s:'''
LMsMLsMLsMs / LMsLMsMLsMs


=== <u>Multi-Period</u> ===

(none)


== Conditional (MM=Ls) ==

=== <u>Single-Period</u> ===

'''1L 9M 1s:''' LMMMsMMMMMM / LMMMMMMsMMM


'''1L 9M 1s:''' LMMsMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMsMM


'''1L 9M 1s:''' LMsMMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMMsM


'''1L 9M 1s:''' LsMMMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMMMs


'''2L 8M 1s:''' LMMMMLsMMMM

'''1L 8M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMMMs



'''2L 8M 1s:''' LMMMMLMsMMM

'''1L 8M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMMsM



'''2L 8M 1s:''' LMMMMLMMsMM

'''1L 8M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMsMM



'''2L 8M 1s:''' LMMMMLMMMsM

'''1L 8M 2s:''' LMsMMMMsMMM



'''2L 8M 1s:''' LMMMMLMMMMs

'''1L 8M 2s:''' LsMMMMsMMMM



'''8L 2M 1s:''' LLLMLLLsLLM

'''1L 2M 8s:''' LssMsssMsss



'''8L 2M 1s:''' LLLMLLLMLLs

'''1L 2M 8s:''' LsssMsssMss



'''8L 2M 1s:''' LLLLsLLLMLM

'''1L 2M 8s:''' LsssMsMssss



'''8L 2M 1s:''' LLLLMLMLLLs

'''1L 2M 8s:''' LssssMsMsss



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMMLsMMLMMM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LMMsMMMsMMs



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMMLMsMLMMM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LMsMMMsMMsM



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMMLMMsLMMM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LsMMMsMMsMM



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMMLMMMLsMM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LMMsMMsMMMs



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMMLMMMLMsM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LMsMMsMMMsM



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMMLMMMLMMs

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LsMMsMMMsMM



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMLsMLMMMMM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LMsMMMMMsMs



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMLMsLMMMMM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LsMMMMMsMsM



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMLMMMMMLsM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LMsMsMMMMMs



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LMLMMMMMLMs

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LsMsMMMMMsM



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LLsLMMMMMMM

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LsMMMMMMMss



'''3L 7M 1s:''' LLMMMMMMMLs

'''1L 7M 3s:''' LssMMMMMMMs



'''7L 3M 1s:''' LLMLLMLLsLM

'''1L 3M 7s:''' LsMssMssMss



'''7L 3M 1s:''' LLMLLMLLMLs

'''1L 3M 7s:''' LssMssMssMs



'''7L 3M 1s:''' LLLsLLMLMLM

'''1L 3M 7s:''' LssMsMsMsss



'''7L 3M 1s:''' LLLsLLMLLMM

'''1L 3M 7s:''' LssMssMMsss



'''7L 3M 1s:''' LLLMMLMLLLs

'''1L 3M 7s:''' LsssMMsMsss



'''7L 3M 1s:''' LLLMMLLMLLs

'''1L 3M 7s:''' LsssMMssMss



'''7L 3M 1s:''' LLLMLMMLLLs

'''1L 3M 7s:''' LsssMsMMsss



'''7L 3M 1s:''' LLLMLMLMLLs

'''1L 3M 7s:''' LsssMsMsMss



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsLMMsMMM / LMMMsMMLsMM


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsMMLMsM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsMLMsMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsMMLMMs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsMMLsMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsMLsMMM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMLMs



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsMLMsMM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsMMMLMsM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsMMLMsMMM / LMMMsMLMMsM


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsLMsMMM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMLsM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsLMMsMM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsMMMLsMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsMMMLsMMM / LMMMsLMMMsM


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMMLs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsLsMMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMLsM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsLMsMMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMsMMLMs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsMLsMMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMsMLsMM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMLMs



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsMLMsMMMM / LMMMMsMLMsM


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMsMLMMs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsMMLsMMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMsLsMMM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMsMMMMLs



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMsLMsMM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMLsM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMsLMMsM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsMMMMLsMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LsMMMLsMMMM / LMMMMsLMMMs


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMsMMLs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsLsMMMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsLMsMMMMM / LMMMMMsMLsM


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMsMLMs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsMLsMMMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMsLsMM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMsMMMMMLs



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMsLMsM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsMMMMMLsM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LsMMLsMMMMM / LMMMMMsLMMs


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMMsMLs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsLsMMMMMM



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMMsLsM

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMsMMMMMMLs



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LsMLsMMMMMM / LMMMMMMsLMs


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LsLsMMMMMMM / LMMMMMMMsLs


'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMLsMMMMs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMLsMMMs



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMLsMMMMMs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMLsMMs



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMLsMMMMMMs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMMLsMs



'''2L 7M 2s:''' LLsMMMMMMMs

'''2L 7M 2s:''' LMMMMMMMLss



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LMLsMLMMLMM

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LMsMMsMMsMs



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LMLMsLMMLMM

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LsMMsMMsMsM



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LMLMMLsMLMM

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LMsMMsMsMMs



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LMLMMLMsLMM

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LsMMsMsMMsM



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LMLMMLMMLsM

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LMsMsMMsMMs



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LMLMMLMMLMs

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LsMsMMsMMsM



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LLsLMMMLMMM

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LsMMMsMMMss



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LLsLMLMMMMM

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LsMsMMMMMss



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLsLMLMLMLM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LsMsMsMsMss



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMMMLMLs

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LssMMMMMsMs



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMLsLMMM

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LsMMMssMMMs



'''4L 6M 1s:''' LLMMMLMMMLs

'''1L 6M 4s:''' LssMMMsMMMs



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMMLLsLMLM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LsMsMssMMss



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMLsLMLMLM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LsMsMsMssMs



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMLsLMLLMM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LsMssMMssMs



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMLsLLMMLM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LssMMsMssMs



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMLMMLLsLM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LsMssMsMMss



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMLMLsLMLM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LsMsMssMsMs



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMLMLsLLMM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LssMMssMsMs



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMLMLMLsLM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LsMssMsMsMs



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLMLMLMLMLs

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LssMsMsMsMs



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLLsLLMMLMM

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LssMMsMMsss



'''6L 4M 1s:''' LLLMMLMMLLs

'''1L 4M 6s:''' LsssMMsMMss



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMMMLsLsMM

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMMMMsLs



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMMMLsLMsM

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMMMsLsM



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMMMLMsMLs

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LMsLsMMMMsM



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMMMLMsLsM

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMMMsMLs



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMMMLMMsLs

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LsLsMMMMsMM



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMMLsMMMLs

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LMMMsLsMMMs



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMMLsLMMMs

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LsMMMLsMMMs



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMLsMMLMsM

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LMMsMLMsMMs



'''3L 6M 2s:''' LMMLMsMLMMs

'''2L 6M 3s:''' LMsMMLsMMsM



'''6L 2M 3s:''' LLsLMLsLMLs

'''3L 2M 6s:''' LsMsLsMsLss



'''6L 3M 2s:''' LLsLMLMLsLM

'''2L 3M 6s:''' LsMsMsLsMss



'''6L 3M 2s:''' LLsLMLMLMLs

'''2L 3M 6s:''' LsMsMsMsLss



'''6L 3M 2s:''' LLsLLsLMLMM

'''2L 3M 6s:''' LsMsMMssLss



'''6L 3M 2s:''' LLMMMLLsLLs

'''2L 3M 6s:''' LssLssMMMss



'''6L 3M 2s:''' LLMMLMLsLLs

'''2L 3M 6s:''' LssLssMMsMs



'''6L 3M 2s:''' LLMLsLMLMLs

'''2L 3M 6s:''' LsMsMsLssMs



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLsLMMLMLMM

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LsMMsMsMMss



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLsLMLMMMLM

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LsMsMMMsMss



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLMMMLMLsLM

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LsMssMMMsMs



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLMMMLLsLMM

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LsMMssMMMss



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLMMLsLMLMM

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LsMsMMssMMs



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLMMLsLLMMM

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LssMMMssMMs



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLMMLMLsLMM

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LsMMssMMsMs



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLMMLMLMMLs

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LssMMsMsMMs



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLMLsLMLMMM

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LsMsMMMssMs



'''5L 5M 1s:''' LLMLMMMLMLs

'''1L 5M 5s:''' LssMsMMMsMs



'''4L 5M 2s:''' LMLsMLMMLsM

'''2L 5M 4s:''' LMsMMsLMsMs



'''4L 5M 2s:''' LMLsMLMMLMs

'''2L 5M 4s:''' LMsMMsMLsMs



'''4L 5M 2s:''' LMLsLMMMLsM

'''2L 5M 4s:''' LMsMsLsMMMs



'''4L 5M 2s:''' LMLMsLMMMLs

'''2L 5M 4s:''' LsMMMsLsMsM



'''4L 5M 2s:''' LMLMsLMMLsM

'''2L 5M 4s:''' LMsMsMLsMMs



'''4L 5M 2s:''' LMLMsLMMLMs

'''2L 5M 4s:''' LsMMsMLsMsM



'''5L 4M 2s:''' LMLMLsMLMLs

'''2L 4M 5s:''' LMsMsLsMsMs



'''5L 4M 2s:''' LMLMLsLMLMs

'''2L 4M 5s:''' LsMsMLsMsMs



'''5L 4M 2s:''' LLsLMMMLMLs

'''2L 4M 5s:''' LsMMMsMsLss



'''5L 4M 2s:''' LLsLMMLsLMM

'''2L 4M 5s:''' LsMMsLsMMss



'''5L 4M 2s:''' LLsLMLsLMMM

'''2L 4M 5s:''' LsMMMssLsMs



'''5L 4M 2s:''' LLsLMLMMMLs

'''2L 4M 5s:''' LsMsMMMsLss



'''5L 4M 2s:''' LLMMMLsLMLs

'''2L 4M 5s:''' LsMsLssMMMs



'''5L 4M 2s:''' LLMMLsLMMLs

'''2L 4M 5s:''' LsMMsLssMMs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLMsLMsMM / LMMsMLsMLsM


'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMLsMLMs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLMsMLsMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMLsLsMM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMMLMsLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMLsLMsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLsMLMsMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMLMsMLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLsMMLMsM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMLMsLsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMLsLMsMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMLMsLMs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMLsMLsMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLsMMLMs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMLsMMLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLsMLsMM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMMLsLMs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLsMLMsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMLMsMMLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLsLMsMM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMMLsLsM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMMLsLsMM / LMMsLsLMMsM


'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLMsMMLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLsMMLsM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLMsMLsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLMsMMLsM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMLsMMLsM / LMMsLMsMLMs


'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLMsLsMM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMMLsMLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLMsLMsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMMLsMLsM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLMMsMLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLsMMLsMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLMMsLsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMMLsMMLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LsMLsMMLsMM / LMMsLMMsLMs


'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsMMLsLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLsLsMMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsMLsMLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLMsLsMMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLsLMsMMM / LMMMsMLsLsM


'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsMLsLMs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLsMLsMMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsMLMsLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMLsLsMMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsLsMMMLs / LMMMsLsMMLs


'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsLsMLsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLMsMMMLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsLsMLMs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMLsMMMLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsLsLsMM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMsMMMLsLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsLsLMsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMMMLsLsM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsLsLMMs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LsLsMMLsMMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsLMsMLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLsMMMLsM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsLMsLsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMMMLsMLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LsMLsMLsMMM / LMMMsLMsLMs


'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMsLMMsLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LsLsMMMLsMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMMsMLsLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLsLsMMMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsLsMMMMLs / LMMMMsLsMLs


'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMMsLsLsM

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMsMMMMLsLs



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMMsLsLMs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LsLsMLsMMMM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LMMMMsLMsLs

'''3L 5M 3s:''' LsLsMMMMLsM



'''3L 5M 3s:''' LsLsLsMMMMM / LMMMMMsLsLs


'''5L 3M 3s:''' LLsLsLMMMLs

'''3L 3M 5s:''' LsLsMMMsLss



'''5L 3M 3s:''' LLsLMMMLsLs

'''3L 3M 5s:''' LsLssLsMMMs



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsMLsLsLsM / LMsLsLsLMsM


'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLsLMsMLs

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLsMLsLsM



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLsLMsLsM

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsMLsLsMLs



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLMsMLsLs

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLsLsMLsM



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLMsLsLsM

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsMLsMLsLs



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LsLsMLsMLsM / LMsLMsLMsLs


'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMMsMLsLsLs

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLsLsLsMM



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMMsLsMLsLs

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLsLsMMLs



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsMLs

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsLsMMLsLs



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsLsM

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMsMMLsLsLs



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsLMs

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LsLsLsMLsMM



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LsLsMLsLsMM / LMMsLsLMsLs


'''4L 3M 4s:''' LMMsLMsLsLs

'''4L 3M 4s:''' LsLsLsMMLsM



'''4L 3M 4s:''' LsLsLsLsMMM / LMMMsLsLsLs


'''4L 4M 3s:''' LMMMLsMLsLs

'''3L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsLsMMMs



'''4L 4M 3s:''' LMMMLsLsMLs

'''3L 4M 4s:''' LMsLsMMMsLs



'''4L 4M 3s:''' LMMMLsLsLMs

'''3L 4M 4s:''' LsLsMLsMMMs



'''4L 4M 3s:''' LMMMLsLMsLs

'''3L 4M 4s:''' LsLsMMMsLsM



'''4L 4M 3s:''' LMMLsMMLsLs

'''3L 4M 4s:''' LMMsLsLsMMs



'''4L 4M 3s:''' LMMLsLsLMMs

'''3L 4M 4s:''' LsLsMMLsMMs


=== <u>Multi-Period</u> ===

(none)


== Conditional (MMM=LsL) ==

'''2L 8M 1s:''' LMMMMMMMMLs

== Conditional (MMM=sLs) ==

'''1L 8M 2s:''' LsMMMMMMMMs
